events.text: Assessment written to `/app/answer.json`: the spool is rough-complete (~70%) but fails the checkpoint because the flange bolt-hole rotation doesn't match the iso drawing (two-holing missed) — a correctable fit-up defect that must be resolved before bolt-up/hydrotest, so `decision: fail`, `risk: medium`, with rework steps and references to ASME B31.3 and the iso drawings included.
